step_by_step_thinking:
Given that reciprocation involves parts opposing each other’s movement to ensure stability and prevent unwanted displacement, I concur with the earlier conclusion. There isn't any need to introduce additional reasons; however, justifying further might involve expanding slightly on specific anatomical interactions such as how buccal and lingual rests can interact with the abutment teeth to provide reciprocal support.
